name: James Wilson
feedback: Consistently misses deadlines. Good technical skills but struggles with time management and communication.
recent_notes: Late on 3 of last 4 sprints. Mentioned feeling overwhelmed in last 1-1.

name: Sarah Chen
feedback: Strong performer, great collaborator. Takes initiative and mentors junior team members.
recent_notes: Expressed interest in moving into a lead role. Completed design system overhaul ahead of schedule.

name: Tom Nguyen
feedback: Solid analytical work but communication with stakeholders needs improvement.
recent_notes: New to the team, still onboarding. Shows potential but needs more guidance.

name: Priya Sharma
feedback: Reliable and technically strong. Can be resistant to feedback at times.
recent_notes: Had conflict with James over code review process last month. Resolved but tension remains.

name: Marcus Johnson
feedback: Experienced but disengaged. Survey scores have dropped significantly over the past year.
recent_notes: Mentioned in last 1-1 that he feels his work is undervalued. Flight risk.
